title: A Tailor's Maid
writer: Agenore Incrocci, Furio Scarpelli, Mario Monicelli
actors: Vittorio De Sica, Marcello Mastroianni, Antonella Lualdi
plot: The adventures of a young couple of high school students: her father is not opposed to their love, but the other, a doctor of prestige, is not at all happy about it.
